name: io.github.jasonwagao/xuanxue-bazi-matching
description: Deterministic Chinese metaphysics APIs for AI agents. Rule-based BaZi (八字) compatibility + daily fortune — no LLM drift, sub-200ms, x402 payable on Base.

environmentVariables.name: XUANXUE_PAYMENT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: x402 payment token for pay-per-call billing ($0.02 matching / $0.005 daily-fortune, USDC on Base). Omit to receive 402 Payment Required challenges.

environmentVariables.name: XUANXUE_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL. Defaults to https://api.decodeyourming.com

tools.name: marriage_compatibility_check
tools.description: Deterministic marriage compatibility analysis. Rule-based BaZi between two birth charts. Returns 0-100 score, five-elements balance, strengths, challenges, recommendations. No LLM drift. x402/USDC Base. $0.02/call.

tools.name: bazi_daily_fortune
tools.description: Deterministic daily fortune analysis. Rule-based BaZi day-flow. Returns 0-100 luck score, dominant element, favorable/unfavorable activities, timing advice. No LLM drift. x402/USDC Base. $0.005/call.
